---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Initialize SDK with '...'
2. Call '...'
3. See error

A minimal reproduction repo is hugely appreciated.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages and stack traces.

## Environment

- Pinecode version: [e.g. @pinecode/sdk 0.6.2]
- Node version: [e.g. 20.10.0]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.5, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Network: [base-mainnet / base-sepolia]

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or transaction hashes here.
